latin: Per totam urbem ambulavimus ut ad cenaticulum dilectum nostrum veniremus. cum pervenissemus, signum in ostio erat: 'hodie clausum.' amicus meus dixit: 'hoc semper nobis accidit.' ad tabernam iuncalem ivimus.

questions.prompt: What did they find when they arrived?
questions.target: A sign saying the restaurant was closed
choices: A sign saying the restaurant was closed

questions.prompt: Where did they end up eating?

translation: We walked across the whole city to reach our favorite restaurant. When we arrived, there was a sign on the door: 'Closed today.' My friend said: 'This always happens to us.' We went to a fast food place.
